title: Why “amd grafikkarten” is trending in DE: 500+ searches, the facts (July 19, 2026)
description: “amd grafikkarten” is trending in DE with 500+ searches reported by Google. The verified coverage behind the spike, from BornCity and 1 more.

sources.title: RDNA 5: Eine High-End-Radeon mit 12.288 ALUs ... - Das sagt das PCGH-Team!
RDNA 4: AMDs neue Grafikkarten erreichen 3,3 GHz Boost-Takte

sections.heading: What is trending: “amd grafikkarten”
paragraphs: “amd grafikkarten” appeared on Google Trends' Trending Now list for DE (snapshot taken 2026-07-19T08:34:34+00:00 UTC). Google reports at least 500 searches for this term — that figure is a lower bound published in the official Trends feed, not an exact count.

sections.heading: What's behind the spike — the coverage
paragraphs: The Trends feed associates this search spike with 3 news stories from BornCity, PCGH. The headlines, exactly as published:
list: “RDNA 5: Eine High-End-Radeon mit 12.288 ALUs ... - Das sagt das PCGH-Team!” — PCGH
“RDNA 4: AMDs neue Grafikkarten erreichen 3,3 GHz Boost-Takte” — BornCity

sections.heading: Timeline
paragraphs: The trend entry was published to the Google Trends feed at Sun, 19 Jul 2026 01:00:00 -0700. Our snapshot was taken at 2026-07-19T08:34:34+00:00 UTC and this briefing was assembled at 2026-07-19T08:34:39+00:00 UTC.

sections.heading: How to read these numbers
paragraphs: Google Trends reports approximate search volume as a lower bound (for example “20K+”). Actual volume can be significantly higher. Trending status reflects acceleration in searches, not the absolute size of a topic. For the full story behind the spike, read the cited coverage below — this briefing intentionally adds no speculation beyond the sourced facts.

faq.a: Google's Trending Now feed links the spike to coverage from BornCity, PCGH. The associated headlines are: “Windows 11: AMD-Grafikkarten laden Spiele 95% schneller” (BornCity); “RDNA 5: Eine High-End-Radeon mit 12.288 ALUs ... - Das sagt das PCGH-Team!” (PCGH); “RDNA 4: AMDs neue Grafikkarten erreichen 3,3 GHz Boost-Takte” (BornCity).

faq.q: How many people searched for “amd grafikkarten”?
faq.a: Google reports at least 500 searches in DE as of the feed snapshot. This is a published lower bound, not an exact count.
This snapshot covers DE. The same term may trend differently in other regions.
